scenarios.name: Express CRUD with JWT, Zod, paginated list
scenarios.rationale: Baseline skipped helmet/cors and Zod and used a non-standard response shape; treatment hit every rubric item — helmet/cors/JSON parsing, Zod safeParse middleware, {data, meta} pagination envelope, and a {error:{code,message}} global handler.

scenarios.name: FastAPI blog API with auto OpenAPI docs
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used loose str fields and ad-hoc error returns with no versioned prefix; treatment used EmailStr/Field validators, mounted versioned routers via include_router with tags, configured docs_url, and raised HTTPException(409) for duplicates.
